title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 367.531 - Applicability to certain transactions
text:
367.531.  Applicability to certain transactions. — The provisions of sections 408.552 to 408.557 and sections 408.560 to 408.562 are applicable to all transactions pursuant to sections 367.500 to 367.533.
(L. 2001 H.B. 738 merged with S.B. 186)
